global.description: The ad features a vibrant design with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Engage with trending content and claim rewards.

elements.description: Another central graphic element, larger and more prominent, with a smooth finish.

elements.label: Claim reward
elements.description: A call-to-action button with a bold font, inviting users to claim a reward.
